projectDescription: An AI-native expense tracker that lets you log spending via natural language, voice, or Telegram — and ask questions about your spending history.
keyFeatures: Natural language expense parsing with AI confidence scoring
Voice transcription via Groq Whisper for hands-free entry
Streaming AI chat assistant grounded in personal expense history
Analytics dashboard with monthly, yearly, and custom date ranges
Budget tracking with category breakdowns and progress metrics
Telegram bot integration with inline confirmation flows
Two-tier AI validation: invalid inputs, missing fields, low-confidence confirmation dialogs
Authentication with email/password, GitHub OAuth, and Google OAuth
Onboarding wizard for budget, currency, and category setup
Demo data seeding scripts for realistic multi-month expense history
publicApiSurface: POST /api/parse-expense — AI natural language expense parsing
POST /api/chat — streaming AI chat with expense context
POST /api/transcribe — audio to text via Groq Whisper
GET /api/auth/[...all] — Better Auth catchall (sign up, sign in, OAuth)
